_meta.note: SOLD comps scraped in batches of 10. No brand filter. Junk titles removed. PSA-only title filter (grades 1–10 including half grades). Taguchi winsorized mean + market stability CV. Currency normalized to USD via CBSA. Prices include shipping when parseable.
